name: Kion (Human AU)
description:
Pride Rock High, a place where you either Rock or you Roll. All the students here are your typical high school stuff, but with the added musical element. Think the show Victorius, this is basiclly that but Lion King/Guard edition.

Kion is one of those students. He's not too popular in the normal sense, but he makes friends realtivly easy. He's a fun, outgoing and optimistic guy. He's the schools star basketball player. He has a scar from one of his run ins with Janja's gang. (It wasnt their fault, it just happened in an altercation betwen Janja's gang and Kion and his friends. Some random hobo did that, no one else got hurt and Kion didnt lose his eye or eyesight either.) He's got an older brother and sister, Kopa and Kiara, that also go to the same school. Kion's best friends, his Guard as he likes to call them, are Bunga, the usual class clown, Besthe, the only sane person in the entire school and a great baker, Fuli, schools star athlet in running, and Ono, the tech genius. Kion has strong morals and a good heart, and a great singing voice that he activly hides. But he can still be as fierce as a lion, better watch out!

(Thumbnail by Zactopus)
creator: Zeronone1
